title: Phi-2: The surprising power of small language models
hook: Tiny models can punch far above their weight with the right training recipe.
promise: You will see how carefully chosen data can make small language models impressively capable.
prerequisite_note: Bring your curiosity about how language models learn from data, not just their size.

glossary.plain: A system that predicts the next word or phrase in a sequence.
The process of carefully selecting and filtering data to improve model learning.
The number of adjustable weights in a neural network, often used as a measure of size.
Observed patterns showing how performance changes as models or datasets grow.
Fine-tuning a model to follow explicit instructions in prompts.
Artificially generated examples used to supplement or improve real data.

cards.title: Small size, big impact
body: Discover how clever data choices let small models match tasks once reserved for giants.

cards.title: How small can a smart model get?
body: Big language models get all the attention, but what if smaller ones could do more than expected?
Imagine a lightweight assistant on your phone that can write, reason, and code, all without the heavy hardware usually required.

cards.title: From curated data to surprising skill
body: The journey begins with handpicked, high-quality data chosen for its clarity and coverage.
Training a modestly sized model on this special data, the team observes abilities that rival much larger models.
cards.caption: Careful data selection is the secret ingredient that transforms a small model into a surprisingly capable one.

cards.title: What if you just scale up?
body: Compare the usual approach of making models bigger with the Phi-2 approach of making data better.
cards.offNote: Needs more compute and memory, still struggles with some reasoning tasks.
cards.onNote: Smaller, faster, and can outperform larger models on many benchmarks.

cards.title: Data quality over model size
body: Instead of endlessly adding parameters, the authors focused on filtering and designing the training data for clarity and coverage.
This shift in focus lets a small model, with only 2.7 billion parameters, learn patterns and reasoning skills that usually require much larger models.

cards.title: How size and data shape ability
body: Drag the slider to see what changes as you increase model size or improve data quality.
cards.low: A small model with random or noisy data struggles with even simple tasks.
cards.mid: A small model with decent data starts to show surprising skill.
cards.high: A small model with carefully curated data rivals much larger models on benchmarks.

cards.title: What goes into a capable small model?
body: Pick the ingredients needed to create a Phi-2 style small but mighty language model.

choices.label: Instructional Data
choices.note: Teaches the model to follow prompts and tasks.

choices.label: Careful Filtering
choices.note: Removes errors and ambiguities from training examples.

choices.label: Synthetic Examples
choices.note: Expands the data with artificial but targeted samples.

choices.label: Moderate Parameter Count
choices.note: Keeps the model small enough to run efficiently.

choices.label: Diverse Domains
choices.note: Covers math, coding, reasoning, and more.

choices.label: Iterative Evaluation
choices.note: Tests and refines the data and model as training progresses.

cards.title: Small model, big benchmarks
body: Phi-2 outperformed models twice its size on tasks like reasoning, coding, and language understanding.
It even matched or beat some much larger models, showing that data curation can rival raw scale.
cards.caption: Phi-2 proves that a small model with the right data can compete with much larger systems.

cards.title: Why Phi-2 matters
body: Phi-2 challenged the idea that only massive models can be smart, making advanced AI more accessible.
Its approach opened doors for efficient, on-device AI that does not sacrifice ability for size.

cards.title: How Phi-2 works in four moves

recap.label: Train
recap.note: Use a modestly sized model architecture.

cards.title: Phi-2: The surprising power of small language models
body: Read the full Phi-2 paper to explore the details and see the benchmarks yourself.
